1-	HBSC (always send CE, parts sent to site) - No CRU
2-	If case on MSD showing normal Lenovo warranty, then work the whole case from MSD. Cases which have 9x5 contract should be added to OVD and email sent to @IBM - HSBC Service Desk  HSBCSD@bg.ibm.com and Karl karlcdawson@uk.ibm.com with serial number and MT.  

3-	If case on MSD showing IBM warranty, then we follow below process
** We send only part from MSD case as CRU, while create CSP case to dispatch engineer
**After a WO is created on the CSP case notify RMC to arrange a visit.

If the machine is in 8 Canada Square, Canary Wharf, London E14 5HQ , always ask to deliver the part to the 8th Floor Management, you can add this in the address inside the MSD WO.

(always send CE no CRU, parts sent to PUDO as NBD) 
(PUDO is west drayton always)

Send part to the address
Comp Centre P1/2 Stirling Way Bretton Peterborough PE3 8YD
Always send CE, NO CRU, parts always sent to site

processes.issue: Slough or Uxbridge = West Drayton PUDO
processes.process:
- Any case with address in London, we always send part to customer.
except if the address is in slough or Uxbridge Send part to west drayton PUDO.
